summary: Founded and lead a specialist marketing agency helping organisations across the space sector integrate sustainability into brand strategy, communications and digital marketing.
responsibilities: Develop marketing, communications and PR strategies for organisations operating across the space and Earth observation sectors.
Deliver sustainable marketing programmes aligned with environmental best practice and Carbon Literacy principles.
Lead client relationships, budgets and multidisciplinary project delivery.
Produce campaigns that improve visibility, engagement and lead generation.
highlights: Established a specialist sustainable marketing consultancy serving the global space sector.
